posts.author: BlackCrimesMatter
posts.title: Diversity is our strength. Black 14 year old is arrested for robbing a lemonade stand for a few bucks. AT GUNPOINT. “My sister, she put her hands up and I just said, ‘You can have it.’ But after that I just was like a little annoyed because we were 12 and 11, and you shouldn’t really do that.”

link_metadata.description: A 14-year-old has been arrested in connection with a broad-daylight armed robbery against two children running a lemonade stand in South Boston this week.  The victims were identified as twelve-year-old David Byrne and his 11-year-old sister.
link_metadata.title: 14 Year Old Arrested for Armed Robbery on Kids' Lemonade Stand in Boston - 12-Year-Old Victim Speaks Out: "We're 12 and 11, and You Shouldn't Really Do That" (VIDEO) * The Gateway Pundit * by Jordan Conradson

posts.author: IlhansBrother
posts.title:
So when a mosque has a fire, (they set themselves) community leaders get 112 million.

When Jews were stabbed, community leaders got 25 million.

When a Northern Irishman gets his eyes gouged out and nearly decapitated, Irish community leaders get arrested.

twitter.content:
Northern Ireland police deploy late night snatch squads grabbing community leaders to deter future anti-migrant protests.

Did they ever do anything like this during Black Lives Matter or the Palestine marches?

posts.author: kinbergfan
posts.title: My favorite "witch hunt" for fraud was Bob Dornan's 1996 House campaign. Dem Loretta Sanchez finished ahead by 984 votes. Dornan cried foul, but a bipartisan Congressional inquiry found only 748 illegal votes--624 from non-citizens. Nothing to see there!

posts.author: DingleberryMutt
posts.title: The youth of Ireland see what is being done to their heritage. They don’t want their old people fighting to give away their inheritance.

quotedTweet.content: Proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the West Belfast community tonight and send a strong, united message: we stand against racism.

twitter.content:
Do yourself a favour and scan the crowd. I spotted MAYBE two people under the age of 30.

The youth of Ireland see what is being done to their heritage. They don’t want their old people fighting to give away their inheritance.

They want soil. You gave them blood.

posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: CORNYN REBUKES Lee OVER SAVE ACT: Sen. John Cornyn tells Sen. Mike Lee he backs the SAVE America Act yet lacks votes needed, calling it math and arguing Republican infighting damages prospects for winning the majority in November.

quotedTweet.content:
We will *not* regret putting in the hard work to pass the SAVE America Act—even though it will take weeks, requiring hard work.

We will regret *not* passing it.

Are the long weekends and recesses really worth losing our country?

Of course not.

@LeaderJohnThune, let’s do this!

twitter.content: Mike, I am a co-sponsor and have repeatedly voted for this but you don’t have the votes. @LeaderJohnThune can’t change that. It is math. Try focusing on Democrats instead of Republicans.  Republican on Republican attacks are hurting our chances to win the majority in November.

posts.author: BlackCrimesMatter
posts.title: Diversity is our strength. Black 14 year old is arrested for robbing a lemonade stand for a few bucks. AT GUNPOINT. “My sister, she put her hands up and I just said, ‘You can have it.’ But after that I just was like a little annoyed because we were 12 and 11, and you shouldn’t really do that.”

link_metadata.description: A 14-year-old has been arrested in connection with a broad-daylight armed robbery against two children running a lemonade stand in South Boston this week.  The victims were identified as twelve-year-old David Byrne and his 11-year-old sister.
link_metadata.title: 14 Year Old Arrested for Armed Robbery on Kids' Lemonade Stand in Boston - 12-Year-Old Victim Speaks Out: "We're 12 and 11, and You Shouldn't Really Do That" (VIDEO) * The Gateway Pundit * by Jordan Conradson

posts.author: IlhansBrother
posts.title:
So when a mosque has a fire, (they set themselves) community leaders get 112 million.

When Jews were stabbed, community leaders got 25 million.

When a Northern Irishman gets his eyes gouged out and nearly decapitated, Irish community leaders get arrested.

twitter.content:
Northern Ireland police deploy late night snatch squads grabbing community leaders to deter future anti-migrant protests.

Did they ever do anything like this during Black Lives Matter or the Palestine marches?

posts.author: kinbergfan
posts.title: My favorite "witch hunt" for fraud was Bob Dornan's 1996 House campaign. Dem Loretta Sanchez finished ahead by 984 votes. Dornan cried foul, but a bipartisan Congressional inquiry found only 748 illegal votes--624 from non-citizens. Nothing to see there!

posts.author: DingleberryMutt
posts.title: The youth of Ireland see what is being done to their heritage. They don’t want their old people fighting to give away their inheritance.

quotedTweet.content: Proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the West Belfast community tonight and send a strong, united message: we stand against racism.

twitter.content:
Do yourself a favour and scan the crowd. I spotted MAYBE two people under the age of 30.

The youth of Ireland see what is being done to their heritage. They don’t want their old people fighting to give away their inheritance.

They want soil. You gave them blood.

posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: CORNYN REBUKES Lee OVER SAVE ACT: Sen. John Cornyn tells Sen. Mike Lee he backs the SAVE America Act yet lacks votes needed, calling it math and arguing Republican infighting damages prospects for winning the majority in November.

quotedTweet.content:
We will *not* regret putting in the hard work to pass the SAVE America Act—even though it will take weeks, requiring hard work.

We will regret *not* passing it.

Are the long weekends and recesses really worth losing our country?

Of course not.

@LeaderJohnThune, let’s do this!

twitter.content: Mike, I am a co-sponsor and have repeatedly voted for this but you don’t have the votes. @LeaderJohnThune can’t change that. It is math. Try focusing on Democrats instead of Republicans.  Republican on Republican attacks are hurting our chances to win the majority in November.

If Elon Musk was a far left degenerate like Soros, there'd by none of this.

posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: CORNYN REBUKES Lee OVER SAVE ACT: Sen. John Cornyn tells Sen. Mike Lee he backs the SAVE America Act yet lacks votes needed, calling it math and arguing Republican infighting damages prospects for winning the majority in November.

quotedTweet.content:
We will *not* regret putting in the hard work to pass the SAVE America Act—even though it will take weeks, requiring hard work.

We will regret *not* passing it.

Are the long weekends and recesses really worth losing our country?

Of course not.

@LeaderJohnThune, let’s do this!

twitter.content: Mike, I am a co-sponsor and have repeatedly voted for this but you don’t have the votes. @LeaderJohnThune can’t change that. It is math. Try focusing on Democrats instead of Republicans.  Republican on Republican attacks are hurting our chances to win the majority in November.
